title: taraxacum scotodes
intro: Taraxacum scotodes is a species of dandelion native to the mountainous regions of Europe, particularly in the Scottish Highlands. It is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family, known for its yellow flowers and jagged, toothed leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum scotodes include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's roots and leaves can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
